holdings.infoBox: BBUS is an equity ETF with a total of 498 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.51%, Apple at 6.67%, Microsoft at 4.53%, Amazon.com at 3.66%, and Alphabet at 3.27%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders U.S. Equity ETF (BBUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of US equities, selected and weighted by market cap. BBUS was launched on Mar 12, 2019 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
infoTable: Morningstar US Target Market Exposure Index
